name: VALERO ENERGY CORP/TX
business: Valero Energy Corporation manufactures and markets petroleum-based transportation fuels (gasoline, diesel, jet fuel), renewable diesel, sustainable aviation fuel (SAF), ethanol, and co-products such as distillers grains. The company sells through wholesale rack marketing, bulk sales, and branded retail outlets to wholesalers, distributors, retailers, end users, and export markets.
sellsTo: Wholesale rack marketers (wholesalers, distributors, retailers, end users)
Bulk purchasers (petroleum companies, traders, railroads, airlines, utilities)
Branded retail outlets (~7,000 sites under Valero, Beacon, Diamond Shamrock, Ultramar, Texaco brands)
Export markets (U.S., Canada, U.K., Ireland, Latin America, and other international)

exposures.sentence: We sell refined petroleum products in both the wholesale rack and bulk markets.

DGD sells renewable diesel, renewable naphtha, and neat SAF under the Diamond Green Diesel brand primarily to be blended with petroleum-based diesel, petroleum-based gasoline, and conventional jet fuel, respectively, and to end users for use in their operations.

DGD sells renewable diesel, renewable naphtha, and neat SAF under the Diamond Green Diesel brand primarily to be blended with petroleum-based diesel, petroleum-based gasoline, and conventional jet fuel, respectively, and to end users for use in their operations.
We sell our ethanol under term and spot contracts in bulk markets in the U.S.
We continue to consider investments in economic, low-carbon projects, including carbon sequestration and carbon capture and storage, which are intended to lower the CI of our products.

We are subject to risks arising from the Renewable and Low-Carbon Fuel Programs, and other regulations, policies, international certifications, and standards impacting low-carbon fuels for more information.

catalysts.event: Benicia Refinery cessation of refining operations
catalysts.sentence: In March 2025, we approved a plan with respect to the operations at our Benicia Refinery and currently intend to idle the processing units and cease refining operations by the end of April 2026.

catalysts.event: Fluid Catalytic Cracking Unit optimization project at St. Charles Refinery begins operations
catalysts.sentence: This project is expected to begin operations in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: SAF production project at DGD Port Arthur Plant completed
catalysts.sentence: Our large-scale SAF production project at the DGD Port Arthur Plant was successfully completed in the fourth quarter of 2024.
